zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410於大約1341年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利時，他的父親John de Annesley21歲，母親Isabella de Ireland24歲。他於大約1360年與Agnes de Clifton在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾安斯利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1384年被列為member of parliament for nottingham。他去世於1429年9月13日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410于大约1341年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利时，他的父亲John de Annesley21岁，母亲Isabella de Ireland24岁。他于大约1360年与Agnes de Clifton在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾安斯利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1384年被列为member of parliament for nottingham。他去世于1429年9月13日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Annesley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ansley
meanings: habitational name from such places as Ansley in Warwickshire or Annesley in Nottinghamshire. The former is named with Old English ānsetl ‘hermitage’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’; the latter with an Old English personal name An (‘the solitary one’) + lēah. In North America, the surname may in some cases also be an altered form of Scottish Ainslie . Compare Ainsley .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 was born about 1341, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Annesley, was 21 and his mother, Isabella de Ireland, was 24. He married Agnes de Clifton about 1360, in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1384, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for nottingham. He died on 13 September 1429, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 est né environ 1341, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Annesley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Ireland, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Clifton environ 1360, à Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1384, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for nottingham. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1429, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 um 1341 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Annesley 21 und seine Mutter Isabella de Ireland 24. Er hat um 1360 in Annesley, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1384, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for nottingham aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. September 1429 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 è nato il circa 1341 nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Annesley, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Ireland, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Clifton circa 1360, nel Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1384, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for nottingham. Morì il 13 settembre 1429, nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410が約1341年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーで生まれた時，父John de Annesleyは21歳，母Isabella de Irelandは24歳であった。約1360年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアアネスリーでAgnes de Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1384年，44歳の時，職業はmember of parliament for nottinghamと記録されている。彼は1429年9月13日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410(이)가 대략 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Annesley(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Ireland(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 아네슬리에서 Agnes de Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1384년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament for nottingham이었다. 그는 1429년 9월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 nasceu aproximadamente 1341, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Annesley, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Ireland, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Clifton aproximadamente 1360, em Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1384, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for nottingham. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1429, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 родился около 1341 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Annesley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Ireland, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Clifton около 1360 г. в местности аннесли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1384 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for nottingham. Он умер 13 сентября 1429 г. в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Annesley , Lord of Annesley 1410 nació aproximadamente 1341, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Annesley, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabella de Ireland, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Agnes de Clifton aproximadamente 1360, en Annesley, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1384, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for nottingham. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1429, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
